cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So there are several people here: Andree, Christie, Fidel, Antwan, and Alejandro. Each one is making a statement about another person's truth-telling. The question is whether Alejandro tells the truth. First, let me list out all the statements again to make sure I have them right: - Andree tells the truth. - Christie says Andree tells the truth. - Fidel says Christie lies. - Antwan says Fidel tells the truth. - Alejandro says Antwan lies. So, the statements are connected in a chain. Andree's truthfulness is claimed by Christie. Fidel contradicts Christie, saying she lies. Antwan supports Fidel, saying he tells the truth. Then Alejandro contradicts Antwan, saying he lies. Let me try to model this step by step. Let me assign variables: Let A represent "Andree tells the truth." C represents "Christie tells the truth."
